mean_cn: v.扩大；扩展，发展（业务）；增加
mean_en: to become greater in size, number or importance; if a business expands or is expanded, new branches are opened, it makes more money, etc.
sentence: Our business is expanding across the whole country.
sentence_trans: 我们的业务正在全国范围内扩大。
word_etyma: ex出 + pand展开，膨胀 → expand伸展
